title: Kimberly-Clark Names Andrea Zahumensky to Lead its North American Personal Care Portfolio, Including Huggies®, Depend® and U by Kotex®
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kimberly-Clark announced the appointment of Andrea Zahumensky to the role of President, Personal Care for its North America consumer business effective October 13, 2022.

title: Why Has Kimberly-Clark Stock Remained Flat Since Late 2017?
text: KMB) stock price has remained roughly unchanged at around $120 since late 2017, primarily due to unfavorable changes in its P/S multiple.

title: Kimberly-Clark's (KMB) Growth Pillars & Cost Cutting Efforts Aid
text: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) is focused on its three key strategic growth pillars. The company is undertaking relevant cost-cutting initiatives amid the inflationary environment.

title: Huggies® Creates Limited-Edition T-Shirt Collection to Raise Awareness and Money to Help End Diaper Need
text: The diaper brand is partnering with designer Kristen Noel Crawley to drive awareness of diaper need in the United States for National Diaper Need Awareness Week NEENAH, Wis. , Sept. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- When it comes to essentials for babies, diapers are at the top of the list.

title: 7 Stocks That Could Survive a Market Apocalypse
text: While no one can truly predict a catastrophic equities sector downturn, it's nevertheless a wise idea to strategize certain investments that can survive a stock market crash. Primarily, all eyes center on the Federal Reserve.

title: Kimberly-Clark Appoints Tamera Fenske to Chief Supply Chain Officer
text: DALLAS, Sept. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE: KMB) announced the appointment of Tamera Fenske to the role of Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective September 19, 2022. Fenske will have global responsibilities for procurement, manufacturing, logistics, transportation, safety, and sustainability, as well as the company’s Global Nonwovens division. She will report to Mike Hsu, […]...

title: Kimberly-Clark Appoints Tamera Fenske to Chief Supply Chain Officer
text: DALLAS , Sept. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE: KMB) announced the appointment of Tamera Fenske to the role of Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective September 19, 2022.

title: 3 Dividend Kings for Income Investors to Count On
text: It can be tricky to choose the best dividend kings for income investors. These companies have proven their ability to survive and thrive through good times and bad, making them an excellent choice for income investors looking for safety and stability.

title: Kimberly-Clark's (KMB) Cost-Cutting Efforts Aid Amid High Costs
text: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) is focused on undertaking relevant cost-cutting initiatives and pricing actions to counter inflation. Focus on three key strategic growth pillars is noteworthy.

title: Depend® Brand Champions Third Annual Stand Strong for Men's Health™ Initiative with Brian Austin Green to Benefit the Prostate Cancer Foundation
text: Incontinence is a leading side effect of prostate cancer treatment, and Depend® will donate per purchase of select Depend® products up to $350,000 to support prostate cancer research NEENAH, Wis. , Sept. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Depend®  brand is igniting conversations about the importance of men proactively taking charge of their health and championing the strength of those fighting prostate cancer with its third year of the Stand Strong for Men's Health™ initiative, benefiting the Prostate Cancer Foundation (PCF).
